name: Keysight Nemo
description: Industry-standard drive test and benchmarking platform for outdoor network measurement. Covers 5G NR, LTE, and legacy technologies with automated post-processing.
howItWorks: Nemo deploys measurement devices in vehicles or on foot to capture network performance at specific geographic locations. Measurements include signal levels, throughput, call quality, and handover success across all radio technologies simultaneously. Post-processing maps results against geography for coverage analysis and competitor benchmarking.
